title: CommonsV2 server time + EMA clock sync

log.context: CommonsV2 server time + EMA clock sync

Both commits pushed, clunger restarted and active. Here's a summary of what changed:

**Item 6 — Server-authoritative time of day**

- `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/protocol.ts`: Added `serverTime: number` field to `TickMessage`.
- `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/game-loop.ts`: `buildTickPayload()` now sets `serverTime: now` alongside the existing `t: now`.
- `/mnt/data/labs/commons-v2/src/state.ts`: Added `serverTime: number` (default `0`) to `WorldState` interface and `createWorldState()`.
